entries.content: plural noun 裤子 kùzi▸ a pair of trousers 一条裤子▸ to wear the trousers (in the house or family) figurative informal （在家里）说了算▸ to catch sb with their trousers down figurative informal 把某人逮个正着
entries.label: A
entries.name: plural noun

entries.content: trouser noun before noun 裤子的 kùzi de▸ trouser belt/leg/pocket 裤带/裤腿/裤兜
entries.label: B
entries.name: noun

entries.content: trouser transitive verb British informal (receive) 捞到 lāodào; (keep for oneself) 私吞 sītūn▸ he trousered a £1,000,000 advance for the book deal 他从这笔图书生意中捞了100万英镑的预付款▸ some MPs have been caught trousering considerable sums of money they had claimed was to pay for research staff 有人发现一些下院议员把他们声称要付给研究人员的巨款私吞了
entries.label: C
entries.name: transitive verb
